subject: Job
body:
Hallo JE!
I hope you enjoyed your birthday!

I have accepted a crappy job offer from MAC Capital, tiny investment bank.
$6100 / month. Which is down $680 from my last salary. I will keep looking
for a better paid job.

I've never had survival instincts come out like in Dubai. I've managed to be
a little cat, always landing on my paws. :)

I always seem to be searching for safety and security in my life, but never
find it.

Much love,
-- 
Cecilia Steen
Dubai Mobile +971 50 940 2062
body_html:
Hallo JE!
I hope you enjoyed your birthday!
 
I have accepted a crappy job offer from MAC Capital, tiny investment bank. $6100 / month. Which is down $680 from my last salary. I will keep looking for a better paid job.
 
I've never had survival instincts come out like in Dubai. I've managed to be a little cat, always landing on my paws. :)
 
I always seem to be searching for safety and security in my life, but never find it.
 
Much love,
--
Cecilia Steen
Dubai Mobile +971 50 940 2062
